message:
test(fcp-core,fcp-mesh): add comprehensive CRDT and mesh node test suites

fcp-core/crdt.rs (+526 lines):
  Add exhaustive test coverage for all CRDT types:
  - CrdtActorId: display, conversions, ordering, From<TailscaleNodeId>
  - LwwEntry: timestamp wins, actor tiebreak, equality
  - LwwRegister: basic read/write, merge semantics, concurrent writes
  - GCounter: increment, merge commutativity/idempotency
  - PnCounter: increment/decrement, merge, net value computation
  - OrSet: add/remove/contains, add-wins semantics, concurrent operations

fcp-mesh/node.rs (+465 lines):
  Add MeshNode unit test suite covering:
  - Config builder (node_id, sender_instance_id, chunk_size, timeouts)
  - Peer management (add/remove/list/clear)
  - Session lifecycle (open/close/get, duplicate rejection)
  - Object and symbol store access
  - Quarantine store integration

fcp-mesh/session.rs (+239 lines):
  Expand session management tests for connection state tracking,
  session crypto suite negotiation, and transport limit enforcement.

fcp-mesh/symbol_request.rs (+152 lines):
  Add symbol request lifecycle tests covering request creation,
  tracking, completion, and timeout behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
